name: Wolfkin
appearance: TODO: Wolf-like features - ears, tail, fangs, fur patterns. Gray, brown, or white coloring.
culture: TODO: Pack-oriented. Value loyalty above all. Often form tight-knit communities.
lore: TODO: Wolfkin are fiercely loyal and work best in groups. Natural hunters and trackers.

uniqueTraits.name: Pack Tactics
uniqueTraits.description: You have advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of your allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
